name: 消耗阳寿1
short_description: It's a boring game with no story, no levels, no nerve-racking effects, and no sound effects. Prices are for development funds only, please read the instructions before ordering.
detailed_description:
For more game content, please follow Bilibili The Pole Studio.
https://space.bilibili.com/51292260

Game introduction：

It's a boring game with no story, no levels, no nerve-racking effects, and no sound effects.
Please do not have too high expectations for the game, this is just a test case of my zero-based teaching, no game play, pure entertainment.

The trial version contains almost all the content, please download the trial version first, if you want to support it and then click to buy, the funds obtained in this price will be used for development, thank you.
